scope: MerlinLairScene static code audit — 5 files reviewed
evidence: 3 false positives cleared after full trace
0 CRITICAL bugs (no softlock, no permanent GPU leak)

bugs_found.summary: confirmToast setTimeout handles not tracked — ghost timers fire on new lair session wrapper if map zone clicked then door within 2.4s
zoneClickCallback not nulled in dispose() — touch double-tap during 300ms cutToBlack window spawns untracked toast on hidden wrapper
Ogham slot listeners accumulate transiently across showOghamPanel() calls — GC-eligible but not explicitly removed before innerHTML clear

confirmed_clean: HUD.ts teardown / reinit cycle — no DOM duplication, no subscriber leak
LairGLBAssets.ts isDisposed guards on all 7 GLB fetches
fadeInGLB rAF cancel chain (cancelGLBFades called first in dispose)
All 6 canvas event listeners removed symmetrically in dispose()
scene.traverse Set-based material dedup (shared mur_pierre, bookMatPool)
main.ts visibilitychange listener removed before dispose
next_steps: Fix BUG-LAIR-05: add `zoneClickCallback = null` in MerlinLairScene.dispose() — 1 line, trivial
Fix BUG-LAIR-03: track confirmToast setTimeout IDs alongside activeToastFadeId/activeToastRemoveId in main.ts runMerlinLair()
Optional: explicit removeEventListener on ogham slots before innerHTML='' (BUG-LAIR-04)
Run visual regression after fixes to confirm no lair rendering regression
